problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい語を入れなさい。
「If I ( be ) rich, I would travel the world.」
problems.hint_1: 仮定法過去では、be動詞は主語に関係なく were を使います。
problems.hint_2: If I were 〜, I would 〜 の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: If I were rich, I would travel the world.（仮定法過去）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい語を入れなさい。
「If she ( have ) more time, she would study more.」
problems.hint_1: 仮定法過去では、動詞を過去形にします。
problems.explanation_base: If she had more time, she would study more.（仮定法過去）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい語を入れなさい。
「I wish I ( can ) fly.」
problems.hint_1: I wish + 仮定法過去：「〜であればよかった・〜できればよかった」
problems.hint_2: can → could（過去形）で仮定を表します。
problems.explanation_base: I wish I could fly.（I wishの仮定法）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい語を入れなさい。
「If I ( know ) her address, I would write to her.」
problems.hint_1: 仮定法過去では動詞を過去形にします。
problems.explanation_base: If I knew her address, I would write to her.（仮定法過去）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい語を入れなさい。
「I wish I ( be ) taller.」
problems.hint_1: I wish + 仮定法過去：be動詞は were
problems.hint_2: I wish I were 〜 の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: I wish I were taller.（I wishの仮定法）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい語を入れなさい。
「If it ( not rain ) tomorrow, we would go.」
problems.hint_1: 仮定法過去の否定：didn't + 動詞原形
problems.hint_2: If it didn't rain 〜, we would 〜 の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: If it didn't rain tomorrow, we would go.（仮定法過去・否定）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい語を入れなさい。
「If I ( be ) you, I would apologize.」
problems.hint_1: 仮定法で「もし私があなただとしたら」という表現。
problems.hint_2: If I were you 〜 の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: If I were you, I would apologize.（仮定法過去）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい語を入れなさい。
「I wish I ( have ) a car.」
problems.hint_1: I wish + 仮定法過去：have → had
problems.hint_2: I wish I had 〜 の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: I wish I had a car.（I wishの仮定法）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい語を入れなさい。
「If he ( study ) harder, he would pass.」
problems.hint_1: 仮定法過去では動詞を過去形にします。
problems.explanation_base: If he studied harder, he would pass.（仮定法過去）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい語を入れなさい。
「If they ( live ) closer, we would meet often.」
problems.hint_1: 仮定法過去では動詞を過去形にします。
problems.explanation_base: If they lived closer, we would meet often.（仮定法過去）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「もし私が鳥であれば、空を飛ぶのに。」
problems.correct_answer: If I were a bird, I would fly in the sky.
problems.hint_1: 仮定法過去：If + 主語 + were 〜, 主語 + would 動詞原形
problems.hint_2: If I were a bird, I would 〜 の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: If I were a bird, I would fly in the sky.（仮定法過去）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「もっとお金があればいいのに。」
problems.correct_answer: I wish I had more money.
problems.hint_2: I wish I had 〜 の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: I wish I had more money.（I wishの仮定法）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「もし彼が私を助けてくれれば、私はその仕事を終えられるのに。」
problems.correct_answer: If he helped me, I would finish the work.
problems.hint_1: 仮定法過去：If + 主語 + 過去形, 主語 + would 動詞原形
problems.hint_2: If he helped me, I would 〜 の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: If he helped me, I would finish the work.（仮定法過去）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「私があなたなら、彼女に謝ります。」
problems.correct_answer: If I were you, I would apologize to her.
problems.hint_1: 仮定法で「もし私があなたなら」
problems.hint_2: If I were you, I would 〜 の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: If I were you, I would apologize to her.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「もっと上手に英語が話せればよいのに。」
problems.correct_answer: I wish I could speak English better.
problems.hint_1: I wish + 仮定法過去でcan → could
problems.hint_2: I wish I could 〜 の形にします。
problems.explanation_base: I wish I could speak English better.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい語を入れなさい。
「If I ( be ) taller, I could play basketball.」
problems.explanation_base: If I were taller, I could play basketball.（仮定法過去）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい語を入れなさい。
「I wish I ( speak ) French.」
problems.explanation_base: I wish I could speak French.（I wishの仮定法）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「もし時間があれば、美術館に行くのに。」
problems.correct_answer: If I had time, I would go to the museum.
problems.explanation_base: If I had time, I would go to the museum.（仮定法過去）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい語を入れなさい。
「If she ( know ) the answer, she would tell us.」
problems.explanation_base: If she knew the answer, she would tell us.（仮定法過去）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「宝くじが当たればよいのに。」
problems.correct_answer: I wish I could win the lottery.
problems.explanation_base: I wish I could win the lottery.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい語を入れなさい。
「If I ( be ) you, I would try again.」
problems.explanation_base: If I were you, I would try again.（仮定法過去）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい語を入れなさい。
「I wish I ( have ) more friends.」
problems.explanation_base: I wish I had more friends.（I wishの仮定法）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい語を入れなさい。
「If she ( live ) nearby, we would meet often.」
problems.explanation_base: If she lived nearby, we would meet often.（仮定法過去）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「もし彼が来るなら、パーティーは成功するのに。」
problems.correct_answer: If he came, the party would be a success.
problems.explanation_base: If he came, the party would be a success.（仮定法過去）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「もっと上手に歌が歌えたらいいのに。」
problems.correct_answer: I wish I could sing better.
problems.explanation_base: I wish I could sing better.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「もし私が彼女の立場なら、助けを求めます。」
problems.correct_answer: If I were in her position, I would ask for help.
problems.explanation_base: If I were in her position, I would ask for help.

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
（　）に正しい語を入れなさい。
「If it ( not snow ), we could play outside.」
problems.explanation_base: If it didn't snow, we could play outside.（仮定法過去・否定）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「もし彼が約束を守れば、みんな喜ぶのに。」
problems.correct_answer: If he kept his promise, everyone would be happy.
problems.explanation_base: If he kept his promise, everyone would be happy.（仮定法過去）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「世界平和があればどんなにいいだろうか。」
problems.correct_answer: I wish there were world peace.
problems.explanation_base: I wish there were world peace.（I wishの仮定法）

problems.subject: english
problems.question_text:
日本語を英語に直しなさい。
「もし私がその仕事を受けていれば、昇進できたかもしれないのに。」
problems.correct_answer: If I had taken the job, I might have been promoted.
problems.explanation_base: If I had taken the job, I might have been promoted.（仮定法過去完了）
